ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner realisation (fr) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Chevington with 33.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Chevington > Pottersjetamay, but actual result was Realisation (FR) > Great Notions (FR). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
